title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
